note: DISABLED and removed. The soft-blend regime layer did not generalize: with correctly-built features the champion alone scores held-out R2=0.094 vs R2=0.013 with the regime blend. It was also never reproducible from committed code (no generator existed for regime_models.pkl). The 67MB regime_models.pkl was deleted from the repo to shrink clone/image size; this config is kept only as provenance. predict.py guards on the pickle's existence, so the champion serves alone. To revive the experiment you would need to regenerate regime_models.pkl AND set 'enabled' true. The metrics under 'unreproducible_claimed_metrics' were NOT reproducible end-to-end through src.predict.Predictor.
